verified: deterministic mountain, foothill, plains, and urban-edge region selection from route position
collision-free near, midground, and distant environment layers streamed with direct route chunks
local-origin rebase and eviction behavior across five deterministic review stages
shared MultiMesh geometry and materials with high, balanced, low, and graybox degradation profiles
equivalent route, streaming, region, collision, and semantic behavior across all four quality profiles
renderer-backed dawn, day, overcast, night, and stream-boundary review capture
project-original rights record for the procedural technical baseline
completion_pending: Q-021 final representative-region art direction and readability approval
Q-022 declared minimum target Windows PC and quantitative renderer budgets
production terrain, vegetation, structure, skyline, weather, texture, and LOD assets
final rights records for any replacement production assets
excluded_claims: ratified GPU frame time, draw call, triangle, texture residency, occlusion, or memory budgets
hosted CI or Apple M4 Max as the declared minimum Windows game PC
environment collision, route elevation changes, or vehicle-physics changes

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: regional scenery is deterministic and streamed from route region plus stable seed
acceptance_comparisons.observed: all four quality runs visited the same 49 chunk identities, four region bands, five stages, and five rebases; placement seeds combine content version, chunk identity, region, and kit version

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: environment presentation cannot alter authoritative road or collision
acceptance_comparisons.observed: every recursively inspected environment subtree was collision-free, the environment collision budget remained zero, and the complete road/collision smoke suite passed

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: quality degradation preserves route and streaming semantics
acceptance_comparisons.observed: high, balanced, low, and graybox runs produced identical stage, region, observed-chunk, collision, and rebase markers while reducing only instance budgets

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: representative states are renderer-reviewable without voids or persistent seams
acceptance_comparisons.observed: the tracked six-frame contact sheet and original 533-frame capture cover dawn mountains, day foothills, overcast plains, urban-edge night, and a daylight stream-boundary return with no observed exposed void

output_artifacts.retention: local review artifact; the tracked contact sheet is durable

failure_logs.failure: The first 520-frame review movie ended after the fourth region before the explicit stream-boundary stage completed.
failure_logs.recovery: The environment-review default was raised to 620 frames; the scenario now exits naturally at 533 frames after all five stages and emits the final environment success marker.

recovery_result: All autonomous technical, semantic, quality-profile, local-origin, renderer-capture, and regression gates for the procedural baseline pass; production art, final rights, and target-Windows-PC performance approval remain explicitly open.

human_gate.name: Representative-region art direction, readability, and final rights approval
